:mod:`netcdf` --- Registering specific dimension classes
========================================================

.. module:: netcdf
   :synopsis: Registering CF 1.0 dimensions

.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

This module currently only implements the resgistration of Dimension-derived classes for the handling of different flavours of field files at GMAO:

    .. literalinclude:: __init__.py
        :language: python
